---
title: "Secondary Tasks Analysis"
output: html_document
author:
  - "John Kafumbe"
  - "Jeffrey Olsen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
```

## `ST_*` alignment

```{r Read in DMS data}
if (!exists("non_aug")) {
  non_aug <- read.csv("./data/non_aug_data.csv")
}

# Replace repeated button-press observations with zeros
filtered_non_aug <- non_aug %>%
  mutate(Left_Button_Press = case_when((Left_Button_Press == lag(Left_Button_Press))
                                       & (Left_Button_Press == 1)
                                       | (Left_Button_Press == 2) ~ 0,
                                       TRUE ~ Left_Button_Press)) %>%
  mutate(Right_Button_Press = case_when((Right_Button_Press == lag(Right_Button_Press))
                                        & (Right_Button_Press == 1)
                                        | (Right_Button_Press == 2) ~ 0,
                                        TRUE ~ Right_Button_Press))
```

```{r Get ST columns}

output <- read_excel("./data/output_IIHS_withDMS.xls") %>%
  rename("ST_Right_N" = "ST_Rights_N") %>%
  select(matches("ST_(Right|Left).*"), DaqName, Subject, Drive) %>%
  relocate(DaqName, .after = Drive) %>%
  drop_na()

output$DaqName <- output$DaqName %>% str_sub(0, -5)

# Add counted hits from data set
output <- merge(output,
                rename(aggregate(Left_Button_Press ~ Subject + Drive,
                                 data = filtered_non_aug,
                                 FUN = sum,
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
                       "Counted_Left_Button_Press" = "Left_Button_Press"),
                by = c("Subject", "Drive"),
                all = TRUE)
output <- merge(output,
                rename(aggregate(Right_Button_Press ~ Subject + Drive,
                                 data = filtered_non_aug,
                                 FUN = sum,
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
                       "Counted_Right_Button_Press" = "Right_Button_Press"),
                by = c("Subject", "Drive"),
                all = TRUE)
```

```{r Locate button presses}
left_button_press_indices <- filter(filtered_non_aug, Left_Button_Press == 1)$X + 1
right_button_press_indices <- filter(filtered_non_aug, Right_Button_Press == 1)$X + 1
```

```{r Add and modify predictors}
non_aug$Blinking <- non_aug$LPupil_Diameter == 0 & non_aug$RPupil_Diameter == 0
```

```{r Plot high counts to debug, fig.show="hold", out.width = "50%"}
top_ten_left_press_runs <- head(arrange(output, desc(Counted_Left_Button_Press)), 10)$DaqName
for (run in top_ten_left_press_runs) {
  plot <- ggplot(data = filter(filtered_non_aug, DaqName == run),
                 aes(x = seq(1, length(Left_Button_Press)),
                     y = Left_Button_Press)) + geom_point() + labs(title = run,
                                                                  x = "Frame",
                                                                  y = "Button press")
  print(plot)
}
```

```{r Aggregate Matrix}
# Long-form wrt pre/post pairs

# 60 fps * 3 seconds =  180 Frames per window
time_frame <- 180

# Get first frame of each Daq
daq_first_frame <- filtered_non_aug %>%
  group_by(DaqName) %>%
  summarize(first_x = min(X), .groups = "drop")

# Cleaned button press frames
press_events <- filtered_non_aug %>%
  filter(Left_Button_Press == 1 | Right_Button_Press == 1) %>%
  select(DaqName, Subject, Drive, X, Left_Button_Press, Right_Button_Press)

# Window of frames around each press
task_windows <- press_events %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  reframe(
    Subject = Subject,
    Drive = Drive,
    # Want the frame number within the run of the simulator
    Press_Frame = X + 1 - daq_first_frame$first_x[match(DaqName, daq_first_frame$DaqName)],
    Button = ifelse(Left_Button_Press == 1, "Left", "Right"),
    Frame = c((X - time_frame):(X - 1),
             (X + 1):(X + time_frame)),
    Phase =  c(rep("Pre_Press", time_frame),
               rep("Post_Press", time_frame))
  )

task_windows <- task_windows %>%
  inner_join(filtered_non_aug, by = c("Subject", "Drive", "Frame" = "X"))

#Aggregate into one row per window
task_matrix <- task_windows %>%
  group_by(Subject, Drive, Press_Frame, Button, Phase) %>%
  summarise(
    LPupil_Diameter_mean = mean(LPupil_Diameter, na.rm = TRUE),
    RPupil_Diameter_mean = mean(RPupil_Diameter, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gaze_Pitch_mean = mean(Gaze_Pitch, na.rm = TRUE),
    Gaze_Yaw_mean = mean(Gaze_Yaw, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(task_matrix, "./data/task_matrix.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Make wide-form version for paired differences
wideform_task_matrix <- task_matrix %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Phase,
                                                    values_from = tail(colnames(task_matrix), -5))
wideform_task_matrix$RPupil_Diameter_mean_diff <- wideform_task_matrix$RPupil_Diameter_mean_Post_Press - wideform_task_matrix$RPupil_Diameter_mean_Pre_Press
wideform_task_matrix$LPupil_Diameter_mean_diff <- wideform_task_matrix$LPupil_Diameter_mean_Post_Press - wideform_task_matrix$LPupil_Diameter_mean_Pre_Press
wideform_task_matrix$Gaze_Yaw_mean_diff <- wideform_task_matrix$Gaze_Yaw_mean_Post_Press - wideform_task_matrix$Gaze_Yaw_mean_Pre_Press
wideform_task_matrix$Gaze_Pitch_mean_diff <- wideform_task_matrix$Gaze_Pitch_mean_Post_Press - wideform_task_matrix$Gaze_Pitch_mean_Pre_Press


# Combine the eye measurements to compare overall "pupil change" per button press
model_data <- wideform_task_matrix %>%
  mutate(Pupil_Diff_Avg = (RPupil_Diameter_mean_diff + LPupil_Diameter_mean_diff) / 2)

# Fixed Effect = Button (Left vs Right)
# Random effect 

model_combined <- lmer(Pupil_Diff_Avg ~ factor(Drive) + (1| Subject), data = model_data)
summary(model_combined)


```
